title: 1981-04-16_Pat_177.txt
key_claims: Dick discovers that the 5D ETI species is perfectly sighted but completely deaf. To communicate with humanity (who rely heavily on hearing and lack 5D vision), the ETIs stimulate human phosphenes with radiation.
Phosphenes act as a compensatory, artificial translation device, converting their color-math language into something human neural architecture can process.
During this realization, Dick envisions witnessing these entities emerge in a meadow. To his surprise, they do not appear as divine angels or Adonis-figures, but as ape-like creatures.

Recognizing them as a sentient, co-axial alien species rather than purely theological beings, Dick greets them with ritual gestures. The entities return to him the soul of his dead cat (Horace/Dimi), bringing him supreme joy and establishing them as benevolent friends.
recurring_concepts: **Phosphenes as Prosthetic**: The flashing colors seen in 1974 were essentially holographic closed-captioning designed to bypass human sensory limitations and allow dialogue with deaf 5D entities.
reading_excerpt: Dick discovers that the 5D ETI species is perfectly sighted but completely deaf. To communicate with humanity (who rely heavily on hearing and lack 5D vision), the ETIs stimulate human phosphenes with radiation.
